title: The Chase Begins
description: Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: They've been deceived by the govern-ment...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Don't torment him like that, ice- burg...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This is a Harpoon I made....!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It doesn't hurt, or even itch!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Isn't all of this their doing....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Insured that they can no longer move!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The charges would've likely been dropped.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What in the world is this....!!

summary: Luffy and the crew push toward the station as Robin’s forced departure and the storm make every minute matter.
